summary: Iteration 2 end-to-end testing of Seldaesthetic: JWT auth enforcement, image upload to Emergent object storage, loyalty milestones + history, 3-tab Admin panel, customer milestone toasts, and PWA manifest/SW. Backend: 12/12 pytest passed. Frontend: all critical flows + data-testids verified.

issues: Emergent dev badge (#emergent-badge) overlays bottom area on mobile viewport; can intercept clicks. Cosmetic / Emergent platform overlay, not app code.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to lifespan context manager.
JWT_SECRET defaults to 'change-me' if env not set — ensure JWT_SECRET is set via env in production deploys, else tokens become forgeable.
ADMIN_PASSWORD still defaults to hardcoded 'selda123' fallback — enforce env-only in production.
/api/files/{path:path} hits object storage on every request without caching; add HTTP Cache-Control headers (e.g., immutable, max-age=31536000) since file paths are immutable UUIDs.
Stamp endpoint inserts an event AFTER updating card; not atomic — under concurrent stamps the same device could exceed 10 (race). Consider find_one_and_update with stamps<10 filter.
Reset still increments total_completed only when stamps>=10 (silently zeros partial cards). Consider 400 if stamps<10 or document.
InstallPrompt registers SW only in NODE_ENV=production; document expected behaviour in dev/preview where service worker won't actually register (manifest still served).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_seldaesthetic.py (rewritten for iter 2 — JWT auth, milestones, history, upload)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows incl. 3 admin tabs, history detail+back, image uploader testids, milestone toast, logout clears tokens, manifest+SW reachable)

test_credentials: Admin password: selda123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). JWT obtained via POST /api/admin/login.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PW_Offer_Iter2 (deleted post-test). Created DEV_ITER2_* loyalty cards (one milestone+reset, one history, one UI seed with 4 stamps, one toast seed). All TEST_/DEV_ITER2_ prefixed so easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_seldaesthetic.py — run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_seldaesthetic.py -v. Upload test will skip with 503 if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY missing — currently working (uploaded 70-byte PNG and downloaded via /api/files/*). Admin auth: POST /api/admin/login {password:'selda123'} returns {success,token}; send token as Authorization: Bearer <token> on all admin write endpoints. Frontend admin route: pre-seed sessionStorage('seld_admin'='1', 'seld_admin_token'=<jwt>) to bypass 5-tap footer trigger. Mobile viewport 414x900; remove #emergent-badge before clicks. Milestone toast for customer requires the page to be loaded once before the stamp increment so the previous-stamps sessionStorage key is set.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Iter 2 implementation matches spec — JWT enforced on all 7 admin endpoints + upload, invalid token rejected, milestone fields correct at 3/6/10, history events ordered desc with stamp+reset types, upload roundtrip works, 3 admin tabs render with correct testids, history list/search/row/detail/back flow works, image uploader testids present, milestone toast renders ('Du har låst opp 10% rabatt på neste behandling!'), logout clears both sessionStorage keys, manifest.json valid (name/short_name/start_url/display=standalone/theme #C5A059/2 icons) and service-worker.js reachable.
